summary: The build request explicitly requires a pure redeployment retry with NO code changes. However, the diff shows modifications to frontend/src/App.tsx (a version comment was added to trigger redeployment) and frontend-file-summaries.txt was updated. While the comment addition in App.tsx is a minor trigger mechanism, the constraint strictly states 'Do not modify any existing code — this is a pure redeployment retry.' The diff also shows no evidence of an actual deployment action (e.g., dfx deploy output, canister IDs, or deployment configuration changes), making it impossible to confirm REQ-1's acceptance criteria are met.

missing_requirements.requirement: Redeploy the current application to the Internet Computer network without any code changes.
missing_requirements.reason: There is no evidence in the diff of an actual deployment to the Internet Computer network (no dfx.json changes, no canister IDs, no deployment logs or artifacts). The constraint 'Do not modify any existing code' is also violated by the addition of a version comment in App.tsx.

hallucinated_features.description: A version comment ('// v2') was added to App.tsx to 'trigger redeployment'
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request explicitly forbids any code modifications ('Do not modify any existing code — this is a pure redeployment retry'), yet a comment was intentionally inserted into App.tsx as a code change.
